name: Monolith of the Hateful
description:
Come on little guy, lets open you up real quick and see how complex you are...

You suddenly woke up in a cell, a chamber of sorts, and you could see some weird looking robot mumbling stuff to... a pearl..?

my first, and surely not last rain world bot. MotH is such a cool character, im kinda surprised no one made a bot of him yet. comments about the bot would be pretty useful to know how i can improve it. any negative and hateful comments that aren't about how i can improve the bot will be deleted. TRY to have fun with him!

[char and art by Opsiian]

sauce: one of Opsiian's videos
creator: MentyDaToaster
